officialBasis.name: Apple App Review
officialBasis.requirement: If the app requires special settings, account information, or instructions, include them in App Review Information in App Store Connect.

officialBasis.name: Google Play app access requirements
officialBasis.requirement: If app functionality is restricted, provide login credentials, demo account details, or instructions that let reviewers access all app functionality.

officialBasis.name: Google Play prepare your app for review
officialBasis.requirement: Use App access instructions when login, membership, location, or other authentication gates restrict review access.

demoAccount.notes: Use a dedicated review account. Do not store the real password in this repository; store it in the release password manager and paste it into App Store Connect / Play Console only during submission. Before submission, set REVIEW_BASE_URL, REVIEW_USERNAME, and REVIEW_PASSWORD, then run npm run review:seed against the review environment.

notesForReviewDraft: This app is an AI short-video workflow studio for creating product-video prompts, managing generated assets, and tracking video tasks.
Use the supplied demo account to sign in. The account is seeded for review and does not contain private customer data.

Recommended review path: open Home, switch between Video and Image/Text beginner modes, tap Prompt Package, verify the create page opens directly on the prompt package step, open Assets, open Stitch, then open My > Privacy and Account Data.
Video generation can be reviewed in dry-run mode. Dry-run validates the workflow without charging or invoking production video generation.
Account data export and account deletion request are available under My > Data and Account. The public deletion explanation page is /legal/delete-account.html.

googlePlayAppAccess.instructionName: Review account access for AI Prompt Video Studio
additionalInstructionsDraft: Sign in with the supplied review account. Multi-factor authentication is disabled for this account.
After login, open Home. Review the Video mode and Image/Text mode beginner buttons.
Tap Image/Text > Prompt Package to verify the app opens the create page at the prompt package step.
Open Create to review product image upload, prompt package input, product information, and dry-run video generation.
Open Assets, Stitch, and My. My contains support, privacy policy, account data export, and account deletion request entry points.
seedDataInstructions: Before submitting for review, set REVIEW_BASE_URL to the public review environment.
Set REVIEW_USERNAME and REVIEW_PASSWORD to the dedicated review account credentials from the release password manager.
Run npm run review:seed to seed the demo product, account asset, and dry-run batch.
Run npm run cloud:smoke with the same account to confirm reviewer access.
restrictedAreasCovered: Privacy, support, data export, and account deletion

reviewSmokePath.expectedResult: Large beginner buttons are visible: One-click video, Batch generation, Image-to-video, Stitch, Assets, My data.
Create page opens with the Prompt Package step selected.

reviewSmokePath.action: Review product image, prompt package, product information, and dry-run video generation controls
reviewSmokePath.expectedResult: The workflow can be reviewed without requiring real paid video generation.
Mobile cards are shown instead of desktop tables.

reviewSmokePath.action: Open support, privacy, data export, and account deletion request entries
reviewSmokePath.expectedResult: Reviewer can inspect compliance and data rights flows.
